vulnerabilities.title: Buffer overflow  in canvas
vulnerabilities.description: A buffer overflow is present in canvas versions before 1.6.11, which could lead to a Denial of Service or execution of arbitrary code when it processes a user-provided image.

vulnerabilities.title: Denial of Service in canvas
vulnerabilities.description:
Versions of `canvas` prior to 1.6.10 are vulnerable to Denial of Service. Processing malicious JPEGs or GIFs could crash the node process.


## Recommendation

Upgrade to version 1.6.10
